46630.note: Deployed to Robinhood Chain testnet 2026-06-05 (solc 0.8.34). Tx: 0x54764c3def25c5f6a0116a0dd069c1fb27ecd52891a9cdc5e04fa58a97e32ab1. Owner + agent signer: 0xEC6613578be203e23e360A3985EA1601435D5907. Robinhood (Arbitrum Orbit) runs cancun/PUSH0 bytecode; the forge EIP-3855 warning is a stale chain-id allowlist, not a runtime limit. executeEnvelope verified non-reverting (tx 0x9e551909082204669b0e2f44759d0d280dd8c985afb7a74b517ee412e4c5695c). Robinhood eth_estimateGas under-reports CREATE code-deposit, so deploy needs --gas-estimate-multiplier 300. Source verified on the Robinhood explorer (Blockscout, forge verify-contract, solc 0.8.34) 2026-06-11.

421614.note: Deployed to Arbitrum Sepolia 2026-06-05 (solc 0.8.34, verified on Arbiscan). Tx: 0x9fb2415cd46ab88f4ef8c8b510c6b5541ec08868f012f840b2cc07797cf67714. Owner + agent signer: 0xEC6613578be203e23e360A3985EA1601435D5907. Recompiled from 0.8.28 + pinned evm_version=cancun to clear the generic Arbiscan compiler-bug notices (none applied: no transient storage, no storage arrays, via_ir off).

46630.note: v2 with the x402 settlement leg: the constructor creates MockSettlementToken (0x3585aA19Dbc8D5ba1Fa37E1940f401E43De03Aa1, full supply pre-minted to the router) and every buy moves 1 mxUSD to the x402 merchant treasury 0x...C402, so a real ERC-20 Transfer receipt lands next to RwaPurchased. Deployed to Robinhood Chain testnet 2026-06-11 via forge create --gas-limit 3000000 (Orbit gas gotcha), deploy tx 0x2544ef9abd79da8be790eabb4a8faf779ad0f16fb495438dba920901aa21661a. Allow-listed on gate 0x0d4E461d19788B0c2Bd72f527F2e43E1eea54d35 (tx 0x12146e83770c5a41bf5ec67b0c835e098cc53849eba272da471a3695240b5f1a). Router + token source verified on the Robinhood explorer (Blockscout, solc 0.8.34) 2026-06-11. Real RWA buy executeEnvelope (TSLA x5) tx 0xa4736fe73d166ced41813649bcd87e4b041d2fd482e0a956348c82e7e9879d5e (status 0x1, Transfer + RwaPurchased + EnvelopeExecuted in one receipt; treasury mxUSD balance 1 confirmed). Supersedes v1 0x3a57f2d32b1eBaa38AEB26957B3Cbc0fB7ee4c3C (no settlement leg, exec tx 0xff64404144bdaea4e08c94e973166af180b29fed621b1e3632757703e9b080fa).
